title: connection.expired
description: Published by Connection Service when a connection request expires without being accepted. Consumed by Notification Service to alert the requester.
_comment_saga: Expiry is a compensating path in the connection lifecycle saga. The saga steps are: request → accept (happy path) or expire (compensation). This event closes the compensation branch.

requester_id.description: User who sent the original request — receives the expiry notification.
